section_miscategorizations.text: The patient continues to manage epilepsy with Keppra and reports feeling well with therapy for depression. He has a history of peptic ulcer disease managed with protonix.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is primarily a description of ongoing treatments and patient-reported treatment status (current medication state and response), which belongs in the Subjective section rather than the Assessment. In A, it could be misread as an active diagnostic impression or new management decision.
